fix.item: Added GPL license headers to PHP files for JED Checker compliance.
Added update server and changelog URL information to the manifest file.

change.item: Switched to a GitHub release-based Joomla update server structure.

fix.item: Removed the external style.css loading call.

change.item: Changed the card-style topic layout to a simple list layout.
Used Bootstrap badges and the btn btn-light class for the button.
